name: Hungry Wolf
short_description: This is very interesting and very cool horror game Hungry Wolf. You need escape from house hungry wolf. You only need to hold out for 5 days for winning game. Good luck player and good game.
detailed_description:
Hungry Wolf is a horror game. In it you need to shoot at enemies with a slingshot. They will appear in different places of the rooms. Toys and scary wolf eyes, shoot them so you don't get caught. You need to survive 60 seconds and 3 nights. Good luck!

* Cool graphic

* Good music
